place: Asbury Park city, New Jersey, New Jersey

facts.text: Asbury Park was founded in 1871 by James A. Bradley, who named it after Methodist bishop Francis Asbury.
Bruce Springsteen’s debut album, Greetings from Asbury Park, N.J., released in 1973, cemented the town’s reputation as a birthplace of the Jersey Shore sound.
The historic Steinbach department store building reopened in 2023, and Convention Hall and the Fifth Avenue Pavilion were recently rehabilitated, revitalizing downtown.
Asbury Park hosts the New Jersey Music Hall of Fame, founded in 2005, and the Asbury Park Music Foundation, which runs the Hip Hop Institute for youth.
The Sea.Hear.Now festival, a surfing and music event, debuted on the beach in September 2018, celebrating ocean sustainability and surf culture.
